sources.name: Extended Malaysian Traffic Sign Dataset
sources.geographic_relevance: Malaysia; 66 traffic-sign categories, 1,413 road-scene images, and 2,870 annotated instances.
sources.attribution: Extended Malaysian Traffic Sign Dataset, Reilly, Clancy, Foy, and Madden, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.1217105, CC BY 4.0.
restrictions: Credit the dataset creators and DOI 10.5281/zenodo.1217105.
Preserve original labels until the class mapping is independently reviewed.
sources.notes: Zenodo archive EMTD.zip; published 2018-04-11. The ground-truth CSV and ZIP central directory were extracted with verified byte ranges before the balanced image subset transfer.

sources.name: Malaysia Road Sign Dataset
sources.geographic_relevance: Malaysia; public project page reports 62 classes, 9,483 original images, and a 23,068-image augmented version.
sources.attribution: Malaysia Road Sign Dataset, Malaysia Road Sign, Roboflow Universe, CC BY 4.0.
restrictions: The project owner must authenticate and initiate the export.
Review original versus augmented images and prevent derivative leakage across splits.
sources.notes: Public metadata is visible, but dataset export remains behind a free-account login and has not been downloaded.
